scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key concepts: temp_model, deploy, wait with all_active and all_agents_idle, any_error. Adds extra assertion step not in gold standard but not incorrect.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout as an attribute assignment is not in the gold standard (gold standard shows timeout as a parameter to wait()). Also juju.status() and accessing status.apps[...].status.current may not exist as described, but these are minor additions beyond the core answer.
